news.headline: Russia demands US and UK reaction on Ukraine plane attacks - IFX.

news.summary: A new documentary titled "Satan, Get Thee Behind Me" is being presented by Executive Producer Travis Peagler, filmmaker Mike Harris, and producer Marcus Mizelle. The film explores the connection between mental illness and other topics in a raw and emotional manner. Scheduled to be released on June 4, 2025, the documentary is anticipated to have a significant impact in raising awareness and sparking conversations.
news.headline: Documentary "Satan, Get Thee Behind Me" explores link between mental illness and demonic oppression, produced by Travis Peagler, Mike Harris, and Marcus Mizelle.

news.summary: Beginning on June 4, 2025, a new weekly series will showcase personal stories from creators, entrepreneurs, and thought leaders aimed at inspiring transformation. Brooke-Sidney Harbour, a prominent attorney, journalist, ghostwriter, and bestselling book coach, will be leading the series. Through this platform, individuals can gain insights to fuel their own personal growth and development. The series, based in Los Angeles, will offer a unique opportunity to learn from successful individuals and apply their experiences to their own journeys.
news.headline: Brooke-Sidney J. Harbour introduces YouTube series featuring authors, innovators, and visionaries to inspire transformation.

news.summary: Yuwell PRIMEDIC recently hosted the 2025 Global Partners Conference in Stuttgart, Germany on June 4, 2025. The event was a gathering of key leadership figures and international distributors. A significant aspect of the conference was the announcement of an extended strategic partnership with Safe Life Group. This collaboration aims to further the reach and impact of Yuwell PRIMEDIC's products and services on a global scale.
news.headline: Yuwell PRIMEDIC Global Partners Conference in Germany signed a strategic agreement with Safe Life to expand global first-aid market.

news.summary: A well-established hospitality brand, Club Quarters, is making a comeback as the trendy and sophisticated urban hotel brand to keep an eye on. The announcement was made in New York on June 4, 2025. As summer travel season kicks off and city destinations see a surge in visitors, the brand is repositioning itself to attract attention. Keep an eye on this renewed brand as it aims to make its mark in the competitive hospitality industry.
news.headline: Club Quarters, a hidden gem hotel brand, is quietly renovating in hot cities, becoming a top urban hotel brand to watch.

news.summary: Annex Brands, Inc. is further expanding its franchise network within the shipping and office services sector. The company, recognized as a top franchisor in these industries, recently revealed the launch of its latest franchise location in San Diego. This move marks another step in Annex Brands' strategic growth plan, solidifying its position as a key player in the market. The company's commitment to providing innovative services is reflected in its continuous expansion efforts. Through this new opening, Annex Brands aims to offer its renowned packing, shipping, and office solutions to a wider audience, enhancing convenience and accessibility for customers. This development underscores Annex Brands' dedication to meeting the evolving needs of consumers and businesses.
news.headline: Annex Brands celebrates opening third PostalAnnex location in Portland, Oregon, expanding franchise footprint.

news.summary: In San Antonio, Texas on June 4, 2025, Halff, a top infrastructure consulting firm that is employee-owned, has broadened its energy services selection by acquiring C&D Utility Consulting, LLC. This firm, headquartered in San Antonio, specializes in various energy services.
news.headline: Halff acquires C&D Utility Consulting, LLC in San Antonio, expanding energy services portfolio.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, Odyssey Marine Exploration, Inc. (NASDAQ: OMEX), a leading ocean exploration company focusing on discovering and extracting vital minerals for global issues, is gaining traction in 2025. The company's success is fueled by advancements in key mineral projects, strong policy backing, and heightened investor interest. With a recent strategic fundraising effort and important regulatory updates, Odyssey's leadership is steering the company towards further growth.
news.headline: Odyssey Marine Exploration (NASDAQ: OMEX) sees growth in 2025, CEO to present at conference on June 17.

news.summary: Today, Gale, a part of Cengage Group, unveiled AI Leveler, a new generative AI tool in Gale In Context: For Educators. This tool empowers K-12 educators to tailor and individualize the reading level of educational content for students. AI Leveler offers a secure method for educators to modify Gale's resources for personalized learning, enhancing reading comprehension. This customization is essential for improving educational outcomes.
news.headline: Gale introduces AI Leveler tool in beta to personalize learning and support student reading comprehension for K-12 educators.

news.summary: Matt Winterman, an industry veteran, has been appointed as the EVP of Product Supply, Operations Strategy & Transformation Officer at Perrigo Company plc (NYSE: PRGO). This comes as Ron Janish, the current EVP of Global Operations and Supply Chain, announces his retirement from the company. The announcement was made on June 4, 2025, by the Dublin-based leading global provider of Consumer Self-Care products. Perrigo Company plc is known for its presence in the industry, with a strong emphasis on operational efficiency and strategic transformation. The transition in leadership signifies a new chapter for the company, as it continues to focus on its global operations and supply chain management.
news.headline: Perrigo EVP Ron Janish to retire as Matt Winterman is appointed EVP Product Supply. (Words: 100)

news.summary: A biotechnology company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, MetaVia Inc. (Nasdaq: MTVA), revealed details on DA-1241, a new G-Protein-Coupled Receptor 119 (GPR119) in a recent abstract. The company, specializing in cardiometabolic disease transformation, shared pre-clinical data on this novel compound. The announcement came on June 4, 2025.
news.headline: MetaVia Inc. will present on DA-1241 at the ADA's 85th Scientific Sessions; focuses on cardiometabolic diseases.

news.summary: In Seattle on June 4, 2025, Frontline Group, a prominent AI-enhanced CX innovator, revealed the national pilot debut of their vCON (Virtualized Conversation) Program. This initiative aims to convert 211 calls into valuable lifesaving insights to aid the community.
news.headline: Frontline Group launches vCON pilot program to transform 211 calls with AI.

news.summary: FXIFY, the well-established broker-backed prop firm, has launched its second reforestation campaign in collaboration with WeForest, marking a significant move in aligning trading capital with climate action. The initiative, re-introduced on Earth Day, serves to underscore the company's commitment to environmental advocacy. The campaign is set to have a measurable impact, with a target goal of planting 50,000 trees in deforested areas. This initiative exemplifies the company's dedication to sustainability and underscores its position as a leader in integrating green practices into financial activities.
news.headline: FXIFY and WeForest team up for second reforestation campaign in 2025, aiming to tackle deforestation. 0London, June 4, 2025/PRNewswire.

news.summary: Cove Capital Investments, LLC, a DST sponsor company based in Los Angeles, has effectively secured $9.1 million from accredited investors. The funds were raised to fully subscribe to a 100% debt-free DST offering. Cove Capital specializes in offering accredited investors access to debt-free opportunities. The successful fundraising indicates strong support and interest from investors in this particular offering.
news.headline: Cove Capital Investments raises $9.1 million from investors to fully subscribe $78 million NorthPark Shopping Center Opportunity DST in Monticello, AR.

news.summary: A seminar in Denver on June 4, 2025, united 98 arts advocates representing 13 western states and 3 Pacific jurisdictions. Organized by Creative West (formerly WESTAF) since 2011, the event saw participation from members of the Leaders of Color Alumni Network.
news.headline: Creative West Seminar marks 14 years of arts leadership, with 98 advocates from 13 states and 3 Pacific jurisdictions.

news.summary: A licensed clinical psychologist has been appointed by Core Solutions, Inc. (Core) to lead the incorporation of measurement-based care and best practices into their Cx360 EHR and AI solutions. This expert professional will spearhead the integration of these approaches to enhance Core's systems. The appointment was made in King of Prussia, Pennsylvania, on June 4, 2025.
news.headline: Core Solutions appoints Dr. Michael Arevalo as Director of Clinical Strategy to enhance integration of best practices into EHR and AI solutions.

news.summary: In Buda, Texas on June 4, 2025, it was reported that a significant number of prescription eyewear users, numbering in the millions, who wear helmets or headsets may be experiencing issues like pain, discomfort, or reduced visual performance unknowingly due to their glasses. Flying Eyes Optics, an innovative company based in Texas, is at the forefront of addressing this problem.
news.headline: Millions of Rx eyewear users face discomfort with helmets/headsets; Flying Eyes Optics offers a solution in BUDA, Texas.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, in San Francisco, DataOps.live, The Data Products Company, was declared the recipient of the 2025 Snowflake Observability Data Cloud Product Partner of the Year award at Snowflake Summit 2025, the annual user conference hosted by Snowflake.
news.headline: DataOps.live wins 2025 Snowflake Observability Data Cloud Product Partner of the Year at Snowflake Summit 2025.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025 in Las Vegas, MSPAlliance introduced the Cyber Verify™ AI engine, a cutting-edge technology aimed at boosting the Cyber Verify program. MSPAlliance is recognized as the biggest association for cloud and managed service providers globally. This advancement marks a significant milestone in the industry, showcasing the organization's commitment to enhancing cybersecurity solutions for its members.
news.headline: MSPAlliance introduces Cyber Verify AI Engine to improve MSP operations. Groundbreaking tech announced in Vegas on June 4, 2025.

news.summary: Correction: Asana, Inc. (NYSE: ASAN) disclosed its Q1 results post Tuesday's closing bell. The report indicates earnings of five cents per share, surpassing the expected two cents. Quarterly revenue stood at $187.27 million, beating the consensus of $185.4 million. In the first quarter of fiscal 2026, Asana reported an increase in Core customers - those spending $5,000 or more. More details are available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Asana (NYSE: ASAN) beats Q1 earnings with earnings of 5 cents/share and revenues of $187.27 million, exceeding estimates.
Phase 2 study of Tolimidone in Type 1 Diabetes by Biodexa recruits first patient.

news.summary: Supported by top tech companies, the funding aims to strengthen domestic semiconductor manufacturing and promote innovation in AI and energy-efficient technologies in the United States.
news.headline: GlobalFoundries invests $16B in the US to boost chip manufacturing & AI growth, supported by tech giants.

news.summary: In Terre Haute, Indiana, on June 4, 2025, Hallador Energy Company (Nasdaq: HNRG) announced the appointment of Todd Telesz as Chief Financial Officer, starting on June 23, 2025. He will be taking over from Marjorie Hargrave, who joined Hallador in April 2024 and will be leaving to explore new opportunities. During her time at the company, Ms. Hargrave played a key role in reducing operating and overhead costs, enhancing internal and external financial reporting speed, and implementing various operational improvements. She will assist with the transition for a short period before departing.
news.headline: Hallador Energy Company appoints Todd Telesz as new CFO, replacing Marjorie Hargrave, from June 23. Hargrave joined in April 2024.

news.summary: In Mesa, Arizona, Iveda® (NASDAQ: IVDA), a prominent player in AI-powered video surveillance and smart-city solutions, revealed the effective implementation of its IvedaAI™ platform throughout Bacoor City's CCTV network. Additionally, the first IvedaAI™ Forensics Desk in the Philippines was set up at the Bacoor City Police Station. This initiative, carried out in collaboration with a respected local systems integrator in Bacoor, represents the second major project conducted by Iveda Philippines as part of their larger $3 mi.
news.headline: Iveda Philippines implements IvedaAI™ in Bacoor City, with $3 million investment in smart-city technologies.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Dominari Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: DOMH) shared a letter with shareholders expressing pride in Dominari Securities, a subsidiary achieving significant milestones in under three (3) years. The company highlighted its accomplishments and progress, demonstrating a strong performance within a short timeframe.
news.headline: Dominari Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: DOMH) issues letter to shareholders praising Dominari Securities' achievements in less than 3 years.

news.summary: Sony and the NHL have announced a partnership on June 4, 2025, involving the extended utilization of Sony's advanced technologies in sports data analysis and visualization, Hawk-Eye technology, camera enhancements, and more. This collaboration will bring cutting-edge innovations to the NHL, enhancing the viewing experience for fans worldwide. The partnership aims to incorporate Sony's expertise to elevate the quality of the game and provide new perspectives for viewers. Visit the provided link for images and video related to this exciting collaboration.
news.headline: Sony and NHL announce partnership: expanded use of data & Hawk-Eye tech. Jun 4, 2025 - NY & SD.

news.summary: A new registry has been established with a goal to gather a large volume of images and information from surgeries conducted across the country. On June 4, 2025, Perimeter Medical Imaging AI, Inc. introduced the OCT-Tissue platform. The company, trading under TSXV: PINK and OTCQX: PYNKF, aims to amass data from numerous surgeries nationwide. This initiative is part of an ongoing effort to advance medical imaging technology and data collection in the field.
news.headline: Perimeter launches OCT-Tissue registry to gather thousands of images and data from surgeries nationwide.

news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, IKE Tech LLC announced on June 4, 2025, in Los Angeles, that their blockchain technology is poised to revolutionize public health measures and tackle the issue of youth vaping. Specializing in IoT, identity verification, and cutting-edge innovations, IKE Tech aims to put an end to youth vaping using their advanced technological solutions. This initiative is expected to make a significant impact on public health, with potential implications for reducing youth vaping rates significantly.
news.headline: IKE Tech's PMTA for standalone age-gating system accepted by FDA just one month after submission, redefining public health safeguards to end youth vaping. Los Angeles, June 4, 2025.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, TOP Ships Inc., a global company managing fuel-efficient "ECO" tanker vessels, revealed plans to separate two Suezmax tanker vessels through a spin-off. Trading under NYSE American as TOPS, the company is recognized for its modern fleet and operational expertise. This strategic move aims to optimize the company's business operations and potentially enhance shareholder value.
news.headline: TOP Ships Inc. plans to spin off two Suezmax tanker vessels, creating a new Nasdaq-listed company.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, in Garland, Texas, Massimo Group (Nasdaq: MAMO) revealed plans to shift towards a nearshoring manufacturing approach due to worldwide supply chain disruptions and tariff challenges. This strategic move aims to combat the volatility by establishing new operations.
news.headline: Massimo Group shifts to nearshoring model amidst supply chain disruptions for long-term shareholder value. #MAMO

news.summary: Gadolinium-160 plays a crucial role as a precursor isotope in the production of Terbium-161, a promising medical isotope used in targeted radiotherapies. Terbium-161 is gaining attention for its potential in advancing medical treatments due to its unique properties.
news.headline: ASP Isotopes and Isotopia team up on Gadolinium-160 for Terbium-161 production, advancing cancer treatment.

news.summary: The Mayor has disclosed that the Campagna Region will be providing €5,000,000 (equivalent to US$5,850,000) in subsidies for the renovation of Romeo Menti Stadium.
news.headline: Brera Holdings PLC and Castellammare Salute Juve Stabia praised for Serie A semifinal run. Mayor announces €5M for stadium refurbishment.

news.summary: SavorEat Ltd., a robotics company based in Rehovot, Israel, has recently achieved a significant milestone by obtaining a crucial industry certification in the United States for its cutting-edge robotic cooking platform. This achievement marks a major step forward for the company as it endeavors to integrate its technology into the heart of institutional kitchens worldwide. The certification was announced on June 4, 2025. SavorEat Ltd.'s stock is listed on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SVRT.
news.headline: SavorEat's Robot-Chef 2.0 passes UL standards for U.S. market entry, TASE: SVRT, REHOVOT, Israel, June 4, 2025.

news.summary: Conduit Pharmaceuticals has signed a cooperative agreement with Manoira to progress AZD1656 and AZD5658 in the field of animal health. This partnership aims to collaborate on the development of these two compounds. The agreement signifies a significant step forward in the animal health sector, as both companies combine their expertise to advance the research and production of AZD1656 and AZD5658. This joint effort will leverage the strengths of each company to accelerate progress in animal health, potentially leading to new solutions for various health concerns in animals.
news.headline: Conduit Pharmaceuticals partners with Manoira to develop AZD1656 and AZD5658 in animal health.

news.summary: Bloomberg has boosted its coverage of {ALTD} by partnering with Similarweb, allowing Bloomberg Terminal clients to access enhanced data for making better investment decisions. The collaboration effectively doubles the data available for analysis, providing clients with deeper insights into market trends and opportunities. This initiative, introduced on June 4, 2025, enables clients to leverage alternative data sources for more informed decision-making.
news.headline: Bloomberg partners with Similarweb to double company coverage, offering web traffic data for deeper insights on investments.

news.summary: Efficient productivity enhancements have led to faster design workflows and collaboration processes. Composite design and manufacturing have improved, allowing for quicker production while upholding precision and quality standards. Advanced simulation techniques and AI-powered generative design aid in optimizing products at an earlier stage. Additionally, there has been a substantial increase in the capacity for cable harness expansion.
news.headline: PTC releases Creo 12 for faster design, collaboration with advanced simulation and AI; features expanded cable harness.

news.summary: In Hong Kong on June 4, 2025, GIBO Holdings Ltd. disclosed a significant development. The company, a standout in digital content infrastructure and creator monetization, revealed the completion of successful trials for its USDG.net settlement engine. This innovative engine is specifically crafted to facilitate smooth cryptocurrency transactions within the GIBO ecosystem. GIBO is listed on the NASDAQ as GIBO.
news.headline: GIBO tests USDG.net engine for multi-crypto payments in platforms, achieving successful results.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Real Matters Inc. revealed the addition of John Walsh to its Board of Directors. Walsh will join the Compensation, Nomination, Governance, and Sustainability Committee. This appointment brings the total number of board members to seven, with six being independent directors. Real Matters is a prominent provider of network management services for the mortgage lending and insurance sectors.
news.headline: Real Matters appoints John Walsh to Board of Directors, effective June 4, 2025. Board will now have 7 directors, 6 independent.

news.summary: A biopharmaceutical company in Lehi, Utah, named Halia Therapeutics, has recently finished enrolling participants for its Phase 2a clinical trial of HT-6184 (Ofirnoflast), a treatment inspired by genetic resilience. The trial aims to evaluate the effectiveness of this therapy in patients. The news was announced on June 4, 2025.
news.headline: Halia Therapeutics finishes Phase 2a trial enrollment for HT-6184 in Myelodysplastic Syndrome.
